title: NRV
description: NRV (NeuRon Virtualizer) is a Python framework for fast, user-friendly simulations of the Peripheral Nervous System, including peripheral nerve electrical stimulation modeling, extracellular field computation, axon population simulation, and nerve impedance/impedance tomography tools.
